title: 8.578ct Lab-Grown Ruby Three Stone Ring S925 JRURR1417Y
description:
Product Description:

Exuding elegance and bold sophistication, this lab-grown ruby ring features a classic three-stone design, crafted in premium S925 sterling silver. Known for its durability and hypoallergenic qualities, S925 silver provides a comfortable fit, perfect for long-lasting wear.

At the center of this striking piece is a breathtaking 12x10mm, 8.578-carat emerald-cut lab-grown ruby, with a deep, passionate red hue that symbolizes strength and beauty. The ruby is complemented by two emerald-cut accent stones on either side, totaling 0.55 carats, adding a refined touch to the overall design. Weighing 5.53 grams, this ring combines substantial elegance with a comfortable feel. and is available in sizes 5 to 7.5 (standard U.S. sizing). Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

Key Features:

Lab-Grown Ruby Center Stone: A stunning 12x10mm, 8.578-carat emerald-cut ruby with a rich, vibrant red color.

Three-Stone Design: Two elegant emerald-cut side stones, totaling 0.55 carats, perfectly enhance the central ruby.

S925 Sterling Silver: Hypoallergenic, tarnish-resistant, and crafted to endure for everyday elegance.

Balanced Weight: Weighs 5.53 grams, offering a luxurious yet comfortable fit.

This three-stone ruby ring is a timeless symbol of elegance and sophistication, ideal for those who appreciate classic design with a modern twist.
